title: Decision Record Metadata (Non-Hashed)
description: Non-deterministic metadata companion to decision_record.json. This file contains timestamps and audit information that should NOT be included in receipt hashing.

decision_record_hash.description: SHA-256 of canonicalized decision_record.json (the receipt-hashed payload)

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when Mayor decision was finalized. NOT included in receipt hash.

run_id.description: Unique identifier for this Mayor execution run

execution_duration_ms.description: How long Mayor decision took to compute (milliseconds)

node_hostname.description: Hostname of machine that executed Mayor

git_commit.description: Git commit SHA of code that produced this decision
